steps.title: Recognize the goal's requirement: “evolved”
steps.content: The goal asks to describe how understanding has “evolved”—meaning it changed over time. To accomplish this, the response must present the understanding from two different time periods so the shift becomes visible.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B includes the 2017 study (ancient grass fires) and then uses “but” to present the 2021 study (cometary explosion). Choices A and C present findings from only one study. That matches choice B — B is correct.
